text:
Bro WTF they demonetized me for the same damn thing. It's BS because it's stuff under fair use but instead of attending to take you down for copyright they use this reused content excuse.
Only difference is when I try to appeal my thing they decided I was still reusing content even though less than 5% of my channel is any of that.
Clearly you can talk to them better because of your subscriber count I guess. I can't even apply for monetization again until October.
author: @RaisedLetter

text: Truthfully, I have no idea if channel size makes a difference, but it might.  That's sad.  Were you able to show them the process behind creating your content?
author: @cs188

text:
​ @cs188  I can really only show so much since I've retired from creating anything elaborate. I've only made one YTP and a bunch of 3 2 1 go memes a couple years ago.
My problem with it is the vagueness of the guidelines and the report itself. I have no idea what videos caused the decision to be made.
I mean it's possibly the meme videos but that puts me into my own dilemma. Do I delete them and cut off the main lifeblood to my channel possibly losing eligibility or keep them on and have to deal with constant repealing and reapplying for monetization.
I'm in a difficult place where that's concerned.
